rulings.Case Title: GEORGE S CLARK et al VS. BHP COPPER INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Thursday, February 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corporation's motion for summary judgment and/or adjudication has been withdrawn except for issues 5 and 7. The motion is granted as to premises owner/contractor liability (issue 5) and punitive damages (issue 7). Metalclad satisfied its burden of production by presenting plaintiffs' factually devoid discovery responses on these issues. Plaintiffs have not presented evidence sufficient to create a triable issue of fact that Metalclad: 1) managed or controlled any premises where Mr. Clark worked, 2) instructed Mr. Clark regarding the performance of his work, or 3) acted with malice, fraud, or oppression by clear and convincing evidence. =(220/HEK)
